'''鈭歱-j-th-dh''' ('''kapajthedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monotheize|monotheize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-j-th-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monotheize|monotheize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-j-th-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kapajthedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipajthedhoko|thipajthedhoko]] || [[word:jipajthedhoko|jipajthedhoko]] || [[word:shipajthedhoko|shipajthedhoko]] || [[word:kipajthedhoko|kipajthedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupajthedhoko|thuthupajthedhoko]] || [[word:jujupajthedhoko|jujupajthedhoko]] || [[word:shushupajthedhoko|shushupajthedhoko]] || [[word:kukupajthedhoko|kukupajthedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopajthedhoko|thopajthedhoko]] || [[word:jopajthedhoko|jopajthedhoko]] || [[word:shopajthedhoko|shopajthedhoko]] || [[word:kopajthedhoko|kopajthedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopajthedhoko|thopajthedhoko]] || [[word:jopajthedhoko|jopajthedhoko]] || [[word:shopajthedhoko|shopajthedhoko]] || [[word:kopajthedhoko|kopajthedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pajthedhoko|th忙pajthedhoko]] || [[word:j忙pajthedhoko|j忙pajthedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙pajthedhoko|sh忙pajthedhoko]] || [[word:k忙pajthedhoko|k忙pajthedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapajthedhoko|thathapajthedhoko]] || [[word:jajapajthedhoko|jajapajthedhoko]] || [[word:shashapajthedhoko|shashapajthedhoko]] || [[word:kakapajthedhoko|kakapajthedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapajthedhoko|thapajthedhoko]] || [[word:japajthedhoko|japajthedhoko]] || [[word:shapajthedhoko|shapajthedhoko]] || [[word:kapajthedhoko|kapajthedhoko]]

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
